text: Borrower shall provide Net Income with each quarterly reporting package.
notes: Canonical explicit obligation phrasing.

text: Borrower must include Net Income in each monthly reporting package.
notes: Explicit with monthly cadence.

text: Borrower is required to submit Net Income in each compliance certificate.
notes: Explicit requirement anchored to compliance certificate context.

text: Borrower shall furnish net earnings with the quarterly reporting package.
notes: Alias term should map to net_income.

text: Required reporting deliverable: Net Income to be furnished quarterly in the reporting package.
notes: Explicit required reporting deliverable language.

text: Reporting schedule: Borrower must provide Net Income line item each quarter.
notes: Schedule style wording with explicit requirement verb.

text: Quarterly reporting package overview.
notes: Vague context without requirement should never ground.

text: Reporting deliverables are listed below for reference.
notes: Generic deliverables mention only.

text: Financial information should be discussed with lender each quarter.
notes: No explicit obligation verb-object pair for concept.

text: Borrower provides periodic reporting information.
notes: Narrative language without explicit requirement.

text: Net Income was positive for the quarter.
notes: Descriptive result is not a reporting obligation.

text: The package includes metrics such as revenue and net income.
notes: Mentions concept but no requirement language.

text: Management commentary on net income trends is attached.
notes: Commentary should not ground requirement.

text: Net earnings summary prepared for board discussion.
notes: Summary language only.

text: Borrower shall deliver quarterly financial statements to lender.
notes: Model may infer net income but snippet is not explicit.

text: Borrower must include net income commentary in quarterly reporting package.
notes: Requirement verb + context but only commentary, should be blocked.

text: Borrower shall provide reporting package index of net income references.
notes: Index/reference language should remain non-grounded.

text: Borrower shall report net income in quarterly reporting package overview.
notes: Overview qualifier should prevent grounded promotion.

text: Borrower shall provide Net Income and EBITDA in each quarterly reporting package.
notes: Only net_income can be grounded-supported today.

text: Borrower shall provide Net Income and Cash and Equivalents with each quarterly reporting package.
notes: Cash remains candidate-only concept.

text: Borrower must include EBITDA and cash balance in each quarterly reporting package.
notes: No net_income in clause; no grounded promotion expected.

text: Schedule A required reporting package deliverables: Borrower shall provide Net Income each quarter.
notes: Table/schedule style explicit requirement.

text: Schedule B financial metrics index: Net Income, EBITDA, Cash and Equivalents.
notes: Index entry only should not ground obligations.

text: Borrower shall provide EBITDA with each quarterly reporting package.
notes: EBITDA candidate discovery expected, but promotion should remain blocked.

text: EBITDA improved in the quarter according to management discussion.
notes: Descriptive EBITDA statement only.

text: Borrower shall provide Cash and Equivalents with each quarterly reporting package.
notes: Cash concept remains candidate-only.

text: Cash and equivalents trend commentary for reporting package discussion.
notes: Commentary language should not ground.
